title: Self-Organizing Feature Map (SOM) Training Process
description: A visual representation of the key components and iterative process involved in training a Kohonen Self-Organizing Map.
relationships: Input Vector is compared to all Weight Vectors
BMU is the neuron with the most similar Weight Vector
Neighborhood Function determines the radius of influence around the BMU
Weight Vectors of the BMU and its neighbors are updated to become more like the Input Vector
